last_agent_action: Seeded the PackFactory root objective, backlog, and work-state files and wired root memory, validation, and startup guidance to use them.

last_validation_results.summary: Seeded the PackFactory root task tracker and updated root tooling and guidance to use it.

resume_instructions: Read contracts/project-objective.json, tasks/active-backlog.json, and status/work-state.json before changing PackFactory root tooling or docs.
Treat registry/, deployments/, and other machine-readable control-plane state as canonical truth for live pack state; root memory remains advisory restart context.
Use the autonomy planning list as broader design context, but keep next-step tracking synchronized through the root backlog and work-state files.
stop_conditions: Stop and ask the operator before changing lifecycle state, deployment pointers, or promotion state directly outside existing PackFactory workflows.
Stop and escalate if the next PackFactory change would weaken the registry-first truth model or the managed remote-session control plane.
